suggestions.title: Art.50 Code of Practice final publication alignment
suggestions.description: Once final CoP is published (expected early June 2026), update all Art.50 references from 'draft guidelines' to 'final code'. Verify compliance demonstration mechanism aligns with final requirements.

suggestions.title: Nihil density reduction via shared_constraints consolidation
suggestions.description: Consolidate regulatory compliance text (COPPA, EU AI Act, GB 45438, NIST, TAKE IT DOWN) currently duplicated across functions into shared_constraints. Reduce nihil density from 10.82% toward <5%.

suggestions.title: program_id format normalization
suggestions.description: Consider updating program_id from 'aiap.dev/yijing_divination' (URI-style) to 'aiap.dev.yijing_divination' (dot-separated) to resolve persistent YELLOW advisory.
